calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alma Beck and Joseph Ferrucci for Annah Kim.

The Court stated that given the explanation in the declaration filed this morning addressing the Examiner's questions, that it was appropriate to approve the order for final distribution. Ms Beck will file the consent forms. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Bloom.

Petition To Determine Amount Of Expenses Of Administration Attributable To Real Property, And For Order Directing Title Company To Pay Sam Efrom Escrow Prior To Paying Encumbrances On Said Real Property, And For Expungement Of Liens
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci for Annah Kim (Executor).

Mr. Ferrucci stated that he had discussions with Mr. Nunley and that they agreed to what amount of extraordinary fees would be appropriate, explained the extent of services provided to support the request for extraordinary fees, expressed concern about not being able to close on the sale and stated that information regarding the liens was provided in the supplement. The Court stated that determining the priorty of the liens was not before the Court. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition To Determine Amount Of Expenses Of Administration Attributable To Real Property, And For Order Directing Title Company To Pay Sam Efrom Escrow Prior To Paying Encumbrances On Said Real Property, And For Expungement Of Liens
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Jul-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci and Alma Soong Beck for Annah Kim (Petitioner/Eecutor). Charlie Nunley for BAC Home Loan Servicing and Bank of America.

Ms. Beck stated that she brought in a revised proposed order eliminating the issue regarding the liens, that she was fine with striking the portion of the order with regard to the $10,000.00 for additional fees and that the sale of the property took more time than anticipated. Mr. Nunley stated that there was no 7702 statement with regard to the fees being requested, that he wanted the opportunity to look at it and object and that there was no hourly break down. Ms. Beck stated that the breakdown was in the supplemental declaration and expressed concern about closing of the sale. The Court reminded Counsel that no payments were to be made without Court approval and stated that the extraordinary fees were quite extensive. The matter was continued to July 6, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition To Determine Amount Of Expenses Of Administration Attributable To Real Property, And For Order Directing Title Company To Pay Sam Efrom Escrow Prior To Paying Encumbrances On Said Real Property, And For Expungement Of Liens
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Continued To Jun-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (821 Folsom Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alma Soongi Beck for Annah Kim.

The sale was confirmed at $620,000.00. No additional bond is required. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
